---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Image, Shifting, Flipping, and Rotation"
image: social-cards/image-shift-flip-rotate.png
---

# 🏗️ Shifting, Flipping, and Rotation {#sec-image-shift-flip-rotate}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Shifting, Flipping, and Rotation
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
